rulings.Case Title: NEAL TREMBATH VS. JACOB MATHIS MD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 8, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT JACOB MATHIS'S Motion To Dismiss Action (Request For Judicial Notice): THE COURT DECLINES TO EXERCISE ITS DISCRETION TO DISMISS THE CASE. DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF MOTION IS TIMELY UNDER CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 1340. PLAINTIFF HAS EXPLAINED HIS MEDICAL CONDITION THAT HAS RESULTED IN THE DELAY. HIS EXPLANATION COUPLED WITH THE POLICY OF THE STATE TO DISPOSE OF ACTIONS ON THE MERITS AND THE LACK OF PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT IN TERMS OF BEING ABLE TO DEFEND THE CASE ARE FACTORS IN FAVOR OF DENYING THE MOTION. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: EDWIN RICHARDSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure ?? 128.7
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 8, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANT VOLVO CARS OF NORTH AMERICA, L.L.C.'S Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure SECTION 128.7 IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE BRUCH DECLARATION AND EXHIBITS B AND C TO THE NOAH DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO EXHIBIT A TO THE NOAH DECLARATION IS SUSTAINED. THE THOMAS DECLARATION LACKS FOUNDATION FOR THE ALLEGED FACTS. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: AL SHAWA VS. JACK TAM et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 8, 2008 LINE 12. CROSS-DEFENDANTS JACK TAM AND TEAM 7 INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD WHETHER THE CONTRACT IS WRITTEN OR ORAL AND THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO SHAWA'S STANDING TO BRING THIS CLAIM. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED FOR THE COURT LACK AUTHORITY TO AWARD SANCTION EXCEPT UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 128.7. =(302/PJM/AY)
